title: Showmer #7763
definition:
Shomer = "keeper"

 1) son of Jehozabad or Shimrith the Moabitess and one of the conspirators
    who slew king Joash of Judah
 2) an Asherite, son of Heber
    2a) also 'Shemer'
nasbUsage:
